attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_XXSCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH)

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.PRODUCT_ID, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.ORGANIZATION_ID, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.PRODUCT_FAMILY, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.SP_PLANNER_CODE, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.AVG_WEEKLY_DEMAND, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.NPH_HOLD_FLAG, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.NPH_HOLD_START_DATE, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.NPH_COMMENTS, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.COMPLIANCE_HOLD_FLAG, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.COMPLIANCE_HOLD_START_DATE, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.COMPLIANCE_COMMENTS, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.PF_LT_GOAL_DAYS, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.PF_LT_GOAL_WEEKS, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.SYS_BOOK_LEAD_TIME_PAB_DAYS, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.SYS_BOOK_LEAD_TIME_PAB_WEEKS, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.SYS_BOOK_LEAD_TIME_LT_DAYS, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.SYS_BOOK_LEAD_TIME_LT_WEEKS, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.MIN_BOOK_LEAD_TIME_DAYS, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.MAX_BOOK_LEAD_TIME_DAYS, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.MIN_BOOK_LEAD_TIME_WEEKS, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.MAX_BOOK_LEAD_TIME_WEEKS, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.EXTENDED_PID_FLAG, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.HOTSPOT_FLAG, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.PRIMARY_ROOT_CAUSE, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.ROOT_CAUSE_DESCR, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.RECOVERY_DATE, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.PREV_WEEK_RECOVERY_DATE, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.EIS_FLAG, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.EIS_START_DATE, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.COMMENTS, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.INVENTORY_ITEM_STATUS_CODE, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH,
 (
 select INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH
 minus
 select INVENTORY_ITEM_ID ,ORGANIZATION_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID = STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.INVENTORY_ITEM_ID 
 and ACM.ORGANIZATION_ID=STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.ORGANIZATION_ID
 and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_SCM_SP_PAT_LT_PUBLISH.REFRESH_DATETIME
